.github/workflows/linux.yml
1name: Linux
2
3on:
4  push:
5    branches: [ "*" ]
6    paths-ignore:
7      - 'docs/**'
8      - STATUS
9      - CHANGES
10      - changes-entries/*
11    tags:
12      - 2.*
13  pull_request:
14    branches: [ "trunk", "2.4.x" ]
15    paths-ignore:
16      - 'docs/**'
17      - STATUS
18      - CHANGES
19      - changes-entries/*
20
21env:
22  MARGS: "-j2"
23  CFLAGS: "-g"
24  # This will need updating as the ubuntu-latest image changes:
25  PHP_FPM: "/usr/sbin/php-fpm8.1"
26
27jobs:
28  build:
29    strategy:
30      fail-fast: false
31      matrix:
32        include:
33          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
34          - name: Empty APLOGNO() test
35            env: |
36              SKIP_TESTING=1
37              TEST_LOGNO=1
38          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
39          - name: Default
40          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
41          - name: All-static modules
42            config: --enable-mods-static=reallyall
43          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
44          - name: Prefork MPM, all-modules (except cgid)
45            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --with-mpm=prefork --disable-cgid
46          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
47          - name: Worker MPM, all-modules
48            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --with-mpm=worker
49          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
50          - name: Shared MPMs, all-modules
51            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --enable-mpms-shared=all
52          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
53          - name: Event MPM, all-modules, mod_cgid fdpassing
54            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --with-mpm=event --disable-cgi --enable-cgid-fdpassing
55          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
56          - name: Shared MPMs, all-modules, 64-bit ARM
57            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --enable-mpms-shared=all
58            os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
59          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
60          - name: Event MPM, all-modules, mod_cgid w/o fdpassing
61            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --with-mpm=event --disable-cgi
62          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
63          - name: Default, all-modules + install
64            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
65            env: |
66              TEST_INSTALL=1
67              APACHE_TEST_EXTRA_ARGS=-v
68          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
69          - name: Default, all-modules, random test order
70            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
71            env: |
72              TEST_ARGS=-order=random
73          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
74          - name: GCC 12 maintainer-mode w/-Werror, install + VPATH
75            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --enable-maintainer-mode
76            notest-cflags: -Werror -O2
77            env: |
78              CC=gcc-12
79              TEST_VPATH=1
80              TEST_INSTALL=1
81              SKIP_TESTING=1
82          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
83          - name: All-modules, APR 1.7.4, APR-util 1.6.3
84            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
85            env: |
86              APR_VERSION=1.7.4
87              APU_VERSION=1.6.3
88              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
89          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
90          - name: All-modules, APR 1.7.4, APR-util 1.6.3 (no APU crypto/LDAP)
91            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
92            env: |
93              APR_VERSION=1.7.4
94              APU_VERSION=1.6.3
95              APU_CONFIG="--without-crypto --without-ldap"
96          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
97          - name: APR 1.8.x, APR-util 1.7.x
98            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
99            env: |
100              APR_VERSION=1.8.x
101              APU_VERSION=1.7.x
102              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
103              CLEAR_CACHE=1
104          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
105          # Oldest supported APR/APR-util branches:
106          - name: APR 1.4.8, APR-util 1.3.12
107            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
108            env: |
109              TEST_APR_TARBALL=yes
110              APR_VERSION=1.4.8
111              APU_VERSION=1.3.12
112              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
113          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
114          - name: Pool-debug
115            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
116            env: |
117              APR_VERSION=1.7.x
118              APR_CONFIG="--enable-pool-debug"
119              APU_VERSION=1.7.x
120              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
121              TEST_MALLOC=1
122              CLEAR_CACHE=1
123          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
124          - name: Shared MPMs (event), pool-debug, SSL/TLS variants
125            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --enable-mpms-shared=all --with-mpm=event
126            env: |
127              APR_VERSION=1.7.x
128              APR_CONFIG="--enable-pool-debug"
129              APU_VERSION=1.7.x
130              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
131              TEST_MALLOC=1
132              TEST_SSL=1
133              CLEAR_CACHE=1
134          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
135          - name: Shared MPMs (worker), pool-debug, SSL/TLS variants
136            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --enable-mpms-shared=all --with-mpm=worker
137            env: |
138              APR_VERSION=1.7.x
139              APR_CONFIG="--enable-pool-debug"
140              APU_VERSION=1.7.x
141              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
142              TEST_MALLOC=1
143              TEST_SSL=1
144              CLEAR_CACHE=1
145          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
146          - name: Shared MPMs (prefork), pool-debug, SSL/TLS variants
147            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --enable-mpms-shared=all --with-mpm=prefork
148            env: |
149              APR_VERSION=1.7.x
150              APR_CONFIG="--enable-pool-debug"
151              APU_VERSION=1.7.x
152              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
153              TEST_MALLOC=1
154              TEST_SSL=1
155              CLEAR_CACHE=1
156          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
157          - name: litmus WebDAV tests
158            config: --enable-dav --enable-dav-fs
159            env: |
160              LITMUS=1
161              TESTS="t/modules/dav.t"
162            pkgs: litmus
163          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
164          - name: APR 1.7.4, APR-util 1.6.3, LDAP
165            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
166            pkgs: ldap-utils
167            env: |
168              APR_VERSION=1.7.4
169              APU_VERSION=1.6.3
170              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
171              TEST_MALLOC=1
172              TEST_LDAP=1
173              TEST_ARGS="-defines LDAP"
174              TESTS="t/modules/"
175          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
176          - name: APR 1.7.x, APR-util 1.7.x, LDAP
177            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
178            pkgs: ldap-utils
179            env: |
180              APR_VERSION=1.7.x
181              APU_VERSION=1.7.x
182              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
183              TEST_MALLOC=1
184              TEST_LDAP=1
185              TEST_ARGS="-defines LDAP"
186              TESTS="t/modules/"
187              CLEAR_CACHE=1
188          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
189          ### TODO: if: *condition_not_24x
190          - name: APR trunk thread debugging
191            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --with-mpm=event
192            env: |
193              APR_VERSION=trunk
194              APR_CONFIG="--with-crypto --enable-thread-debug"
195          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
196          - name: ASan
197            notest-cflags: -ggdb -fsanitize=address -fno-sanitize-recover=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer
198            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
199            env: |
200              APR_VERSION=1.7.x
201              APU_VERSION=1.7.x
202              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
203              TEST_ASAN=1
204              CLEAR_CACHE=1
205          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
206          - name: ASan, pool-debug
207            notest-cflags: -ggdb -fsanitize=address -fno-sanitize-recover=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer
208            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall
209            env: |
210              APR_VERSION=1.7.x
211              APR_CONFIG="--enable-pool-debug"
212              APU_VERSION=1.7.x
213              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
214              TEST_ASAN=1
215              CLEAR_CACHE=1
216          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
217          - name: HTTP/2 test suite
218            config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --with-mpm=event --enable-mpms-shared=all
219            pkgs: curl python3-pytest nghttp2-client python3-cryptography python3-requests python3-multipart python3-filelock python3-websockets
220            env: |
221              APR_VERSION=1.7.4
222              APU_VERSION=1.6.3
223              APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto"
224              NO_TEST_FRAMEWORK=1
225              TEST_INSTALL=1
226              TEST_H2=1
227              TEST_CORE=1
228              TEST_PROXY=1
229          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
230          ### TODO: if: *condition_not_24x
231          ### TODO: pebble install is broken.
232          # - name: ACME test suite
233          #   config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --with-mpm=event --enable-mpms-shared=event
234          #   pkgs: >-
235          #     python3-pytest nghttp2-client python3-cryptography python3-requests python3-filelock
236          #     golang-1.17 curl
237          #   env: |
238          #     APR_VERSION=1.7.4
239          #     APU_VERSION=1.6.3
240          #     APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto"
241          #     GOROOT=/usr/lib/go-1.17
242          #     NO_TEST_FRAMEWORK=1
243          #     TEST_INSTALL=1
244          #     TEST_MD=1
245          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
246          ### TODO: if: *condition_not_24x
247          # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
248          ### TODO if: *condition_not_24x
249          ### TODO: Fails because :i386 packages are not being found.
250          # - name: i386 Shared MPMs, most modules, maintainer-mode w/-Werror
251          #   config: --enable-mods-shared=reallyall --disable-xml2enc --disable-proxy-html --enable-mpms-shared=all --enable-maintainer-mode
252          #   pkgs: >-
253          #     cpanminus libc6-dev-i386 gcc-multilib libexpat1-dev:i386 libssl-dev:i386
254          #     lib32z1-dev libbrotli-dev:i386 libpcre2-dev:i386 libldap2-dev:i386 libtool-bin
255          #     perl-doc libapr1-dev libbrotli-dev:i386
256          #   env: |
257          #     PKG_CONFIG_PATH="/usr/lib/i386-linux-gnu/pkgconfig"
258          #     NOTEST_CFLAGS="-Werror"
259          #     CC="gcc -m32"
260          #     APR_VERSION=1.7.3
261          #     APU_VERSION=1.6.3
262          # APU_CONFIG="--with-crypto --with-ldap"
263    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os == '' && 'ubuntu-latest' || matrix.os }}
264    timeout-minutes: 30
265    env:
266      NOTEST_CFLAGS: ${{ matrix.notest-cflags }}
267      CONFIG: ${{ matrix.config }}
268    name: ${{ matrix.name }}
269    steps:
270    # JOBID is used in the cache keys, created here as a hash of all
271    # properties of the environment, including the image OS version,
272    # compiler flags and any job-specific properties.
273    - name: Set environment variables
274      run: |
275        echo "${{ matrix.env }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
276        echo JOBID=`echo "OS=$ImageOS ${{ matrix.notest-cflags }} ${{ matrix.env }} ${{ matrix.config }}" \
277           | md5sum - | sed 's/ .*//'` >> $GITHUB_ENV
278    # https://github.com/actions/runner-images/issues/9491#issuecomment-1989718917
279    - name: Workaround ASAN issue in Ubuntu 22.04
280      run: sudo sysctl vm.mmap_rnd_bits=28
281    - name: apt refresh
282      run: sudo apt-get -o Acquire::Retries=5 update
283    - name: Install prerequisites
284      run: sudo apt-get install -o Acquire::Retries=5
285                    cpanminus libtool-bin libapr1-dev libaprutil1-dev
286                    liblua5.3-dev libbrotli-dev libcurl4-openssl-dev     
287                    libnghttp2-dev libjansson-dev libpcre2-dev gdb
288                    perl-doc libsasl2-dev ${{ matrix.pkgs }}
289    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
290    - name: Cache installed libraries
291      uses: actions/cache@v4
292      with:
293        path: ~/root
294        key: cache-libs-${{ env.JOBID }}
295    - name: Cache CPAN modules
296      uses: actions/cache@v4
297      with:
298        path: ~/perl5
299        key: cache-cpan-${{ env.JOBID }}
300    - name: Configure environment
301      run: ./test/travis_before_linux.sh
302      timeout-minutes: 15
303    - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
304      if: failure()
305      with:
306        name: config.log-${{ env.JOBID }}
307        path: |
308          /home/runner/build/**/config.log
309    - name: Build and test
310      run: ./test/travis_run_linux.sh
311    - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
312      if: failure()
313      with:
314        name: error_log-${{ env.JOBID }}
315        path: |
316          **/config.log
317          test/perl-framework/t/logs/error_log
